name: Boon of Revelry
description: Increase your Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma score by 1, to a maximum of 30. You always have the Otto's Irresistible Dance spell prepared. You can cast it once without a spell slot or components, and regain the ability to do so after a long rest. Damage doesn't break your concentration on this spell. While a creature is charmed by this spell, it cannot cast spells with verbal components and sings delightful nonsense.
